element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns fundamental combat against first opponent
Buzz (strong/slow), Ty (agile/kickboxing), Kato (quick/martial arts) - mechanical variety introduced upfront
High-risk high-reward mechanic used when cornered or facing multiple opponents
Temporary damage boost and reduction - introduces resource management
Environmental hazard that punishes reckless positioning near arena edges
Three-knockdown elimination format; CPU clone or multiplayer free-for-all; introduces rhythm break
Victory incentive; losing Grudge Match has no penalty
Mysterious taunting entity; represents ultimate difficulty spike and narrative climax

typical_relief_triggers: Grudge Match victory grants bonus money (low stakes penalty for loss)
typical_tension_triggers: Every third fight (Grudge Match) - sudden format shift to three-knockdown elimination
Multiple opponents during Grudge Match free-for-all
Final Championship Match vs Masked Warrior
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Episodic tension with predictable Grudge Match rhythm (every 3rd fight). Standard matches build gradually; Grudge Matches punctuate with sudden difficulty and rule shifts. Crowd interference creates micro-bursts of chaos. Final boss represents hard cap.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Learning phase: basic punch/kick combos, single opponents, introduction to three character archetypes with different move sets and speeds
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalation: crowd interference begins affecting match outcome, Grudge Match format (every third fight) introduces sudden rule changes and three-knockdown elimination; bonus money incentive adds secondary objective
difficulty_curve.late_game: Intensification: multiple consecutive matches building toward Championship Match; final opponent (Masked Warrior) represents significant jump in difficulty as mysterious taunting entity
notable_spikes: Match 3 (first Grudge Match) - surprise format shift to three-knockdown elimination and multiplayer dynamics
Every third match thereafter - predictable but disruptive rhythm breaks
Championship Match - Masked Warrior final boss after 15 standard matches

notable_level_patterns.description: One-on-one combat until opponent energy depleted. Crowd can interfere with weapons, attacks, or knockback. Power pills occasionally drop. Forms baseline 2/3 of match sequence.

Three-knockdown elimination format. Single player faces CPU clone of own character; multiplayer becomes free-for-all between human players. Last standing wins. Losing has no penalty but winning grants bonus money. Distinct from standard matches in rules and psychological pacing.
Player (or winning player in multiplayer) faces Masked Warrior. Represents narrative climax and ultimate difficulty. Mysterious entity that taunted player between matches throughout game.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Final match after completing 15 prior matches
